name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
shortDescription: A static stretch targeting the hamstring muscles along the back of the upper leg.
instructions: Stand tall and keep knees slightly bent. Hinge forward at the hips, lowering your torso while reaching towards your toes to feel a gentle stretch in your hamstrings. Hold the stretch without bouncing.
steps: Stand up straight with feet hip-width apart.
Keep knees soft, and hinge forward at the hips.
Lower your torso toward your legs while reaching for your toes.
Stop when you feel a gentle stretch in your hamstrings.
Hold for the desired duration, then return to standing.
breathing: Exhale as you hinge forward, inhale as you return upright.
